template.p: Odoo empowers you to manage every aspect of your construction projects effortlessly and efficiently, and its integrated applications ensure unparalleled success and client satisfaction.
The construction industries come in two parts:
A streamlined industry package for companies focused on simple jobs, rapid quoting, and efficient execution.
It covers essential quoting, basic project setup, straightforward planning, material coordination, and smooth on-site delivery.
Ideal for teams seeking operational efficiency without unnecessary complexity.
A complete solution tailored for construction companies overseeing complex and multi-trade projects.
It delivers fine-tuned estimation tools, subcontractor management, advanced planning, materials forecasting, progress driven billing.
Perfect for companies needing structured workflows and high-precision project management.
The module comes of top of the Construction Builder setup providing additional capabilities.

li.p: Project App: Manage construction sites as projects, organizing tasks into stages like "Foundation," "Framing," and "Finishing" with clear deadlines.
Timesheets App: Track labour hours accurately with a mobile app that allows workers to log time against specific tasks or cost codes on-site.
Field Service App: Schedule and dispatch specialized crews for specific interventions, tracking their location and job status in real-time.
Purchase App: Automate the procurement of building materials, managing RFQs and purchase orders to ensure timely delivery to the site.
Inventory App: Keep track of tools, equipment, and consumables across multiple sites or warehouses, reducing loss and theft.
Invoicing App: Handle complex billing scenarios like milestone invoicing, down payments, and retention based on project progress.
Documents App: Centralize blueprints, contracts, and permits, ensuring that the latest versions are always available to the team.
Fleet App: Manage your heavy machinery and vehicle fleet, tracking maintenance schedules, fuel costs, and driver assignments.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few products, sale orders and more.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your package and check the related box

template.p:
The CRM module helps construction companies capture leads from multiple sources, track communications, and schedule follow-ups.
You can prioritize high-value opportunities and turn inquiries into profitable projects.

ul.li: Leads & Opportunities: Record incoming inquiries from emails, forms, or calls.
Pipeline Management: Visualize lead stages and prioritize follow-ups.
Chatter & Communication: Collaborate internally using notes and messages linked to opportunities.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Setup an email alias for your pipeline to automatically create new leads!

template.p: The Sales App enables rapid creation of professional quotations. You can use product kits for materials, apply discounts, and send polished proposals directly to clients.

ul.li: Quotation Templates: Predefine templates for recurrent offers.
Pricing & Discounts: Adjust based on project size or client agreements.
PDF Output: Send branded quotations for client approval.
Online Approval: Enable online customer approval.
Chatter & Communication: Collaborate internally using notes and messages linked to opportunities.

template.p: Once confirmed, the quotation becomes a sales order.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p:
Save time by directly sending the quotation by email to your customer.
The personalized email provides:

ul.li: The quotation in PDF format
A link to reach the online quotation from where the customer can confirm and sign it.

div.div: If the customer replies to the email, the answer is automatically logged in the chatter on the right of the screen. Thereby, all the discussions regarding the quotation, its updates, and its fine tuning are attached, and the history can be easily consulted by all the involved users

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: If your country benefits from a tax rebate under certain conditions, you can easily apply it to your entire quotation by creating a fiscal position that will automatically replace the default tax rate by the reduced one
﻿﻿🎓 Fiscal Positions ﻿﻿

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Sales﻿﻿
template.h5: ⏳ First quote in record time leveraging the work items (Construction Developer)
template.p:
Making sure you don't waste time generating quotes which may never be signed is paramount to run your business efficiently.
To help you with this aspects, we configured the Sales App with work items to be leveraged straight from quotation from.

ul.li: Generate a new quotation and select the Carport Construction template.
Adjust quantities according to customer needs.

Fine tune each work item clicking the line magic stick icon to secure your margin.
You're all set to send a first quote to your customer!
Iterate as needed until your customer approves the order, then confirm it!

template.p: Find your work item templates from the Sales App / Products / Work Items menu.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div: Import your work item database in few clicks!

ul.li: Download the herein file.
Open the Product Variants list and proceed to import of the "1. Product Variants Import" sheet
Open again the Product Variants list, select them all and proceed to an (import-compatible) export with only their names
Copy paste the export outcome in the "2. Product Variants Export" sheet
Open the Work Items list and proceed to import of the "3. Work Items Import" sheet

template.h5: 🧮 Advanced quote computations with the calculator
template.p:
In some cases, you might look for more advanced computations to fine tune your quotes...
We got you covered here with the quote calculator!

ul.li: Generate a new quotation and select the Renovation Project template.
Open the quote calculator from the smart buttons.

Assuming there will be manual labour behind every product from the quote, start filling the time estimate for some of them.
The total labour time and even time for project management and purchases are computed accordingly...

Save the calculator and come back to your quote.
The Labour & Project Follow-up section has been updated in consequence!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div: With Spreadsheet App under the hood, you have the freedom to confirgure quote calculators meeting your exact needs.
Read more about the quote calculator ﻿ ﻿here﻿﻿.

template.p:
Construction may not always go as planned and quotations may be built based on estimates. The question when it takes more time or consumes more material due to erroneous estimates is who owns the risk?
To help you with that, the construction industry comes with a contract type which helps you clarifying that upfront any issue, directly in your quote.

ul.li: Create a new quotation / sale order, assign a customer and select a quotation template to save time.
Open the Other Info tab and in the Invoicing section, adjust the Contract Type per your needs.
When selecting Per Line, a new column is exposed for you to specify for each lines the contract type.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: This information reflects straight away in your quotations, whether send as pdf file or with a preview.

template.p: You setup a quote and now want to know how it breaks down in terms of cost nature, it is available at your finger tips!

ul.li: From the quotation, simply hit the Cost Nature smart button to access the analysis.
Similarly, this is available for all sale orders of a project from the project form smart buttons.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: You not only have access to cost nature break down here, but can drill into product categories, work items and products to capture where to be more competitive or marge more!

template.p: Do your construction projects go always according to plan? If not, here is how to handle change orders and extras.

ul.li: Open the project for which you want to introduce a change order.
Click the Sale Orders shortcut from the top bar.
Here click "New" and adjust the sale order details as needed.
On confirmation, the sale order is associated to your project!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: When selling change order, make sure not to use service products creating new projects to keep things in order in a single project.

template.p: In some countries, specific tax discount may apply in construction. To handle this, you can use the fiscal position and adjust by which tax replacing one. Assigning the applicable fiscal position to your customer will make sure to use the appropriate taxes!

ul.li: From the Invoicing app Configuration menu, open the Fiscal Positions.
Create a new fiscal position, give it a name and assign the applicable country.
Open now the Taxes still from the configuration menu.
Create a new tax or select the applicable one if existing in your localisation package.
Configure it as needed in terms of amount and assign it to your newly created fiscal position.
If properly setup, the Replaces field is displayed and can be populated with the taxes this tax replaces in this fiscal position.
In the Advanced Options tab, adjust the label, country and assign or create a tax group for it.
Open the contact form of your contact eligible to the tax discount associated to this fiscal position.
In the Sales & Purchase tab, select the applicable fiscal position.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Fiscal Positions﻿﻿

Starting a construction project implies a lot of important documents such as contracts, building plans, instructions for use, subcontracting agreements, etc. Instead of scattering them in your emails, storage services or computer, attach them in the chatter and they will be automatically centralized in the Documents App .

ul.li: Project Files: Attach blueprints, permits, and contracts.
Version Control: Track updates to important documents.
Access Control: Limit sensitive files to relevant team members.
Document Requests: Send requests with follow up activities.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: All new projects get their dedicated document folder from the template project folder. Adjust it according to your needs!

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Documents﻿﻿
template.h3: 🏗️ Manage your construction project with ease
template.p: The Projects App allows you to manage tasks, assign resources, and create milestones for each construction project.

ul.li: Task Creation: Break down construction phases into actionable items.
Milestones: Define major project achievements.
Assignments: Allocate engineers, site managers, and subcontractors.
Project Updates: Capture project snapshots along the way from the dashboard.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Project﻿﻿

On sale order confirmation, the project template is duplicated for the new project to start (triggered by the Project Management product).
It comes with some predefined tasks and some additional ones directly coming from the sold products:

ul.li: Architect
Down Payment
Planification
Work
Receipt

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div: Of course, these default tasks can be adapted in the Project Template according to your personal way of managing a construction project.

template.p: Eliminate manual entry and guesswork by transforming your technical quotes into actionable procurement data. This feature automatically extracts every bolt, brick, and beam required for your project by decomposing your Work Items into a consolidated shopping list.

ul.li: Prepare your Sale Order with structured sections and articles containing Work Items.
Access your consolidated requirements via the Procurement smart button as well as from the Inventory App and the Project Top Bar "Needs" button

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Automated extraction:

ul.li: Odoo scans every component within your Work Items to find underlying needs, filtering components by the Material Cost Nature, ensuring your list isn't cluttered with labor or equipment hours.
Identical materials across different sections are summed up, giving you total volumes for better supplier negotiations.

template.p: Efficient project management comes with every needed input at your fingertips, simple ways to handle work and follow up.

ul.li: From the project, expose all related aspects you want to have at your fingertips with the slider icon (🎚️): tasks, time sheets, planning, documents... and most importantly the dashboard.
Open the project dashboard and create new updates to capture progress in terms of:
Time spent on the project.
Materials purchased.
Materials sold.

template.p: Capturing remarks during on-site visits and easily following up on them is paramount for clarity with stakeholders and workers.

ul.li: From project updates, navigate to the Remarks tab, add as many remarks as needed with the corresponding details.
From calendar meetings, add as many remarks as needed to the Remarks tab after selecting the related project.
Find all project remarks and efficiently review them from the Remarks button shortcut in the project top bar.
Alternatively, open the Remarks, from the Reporting menu of the Project App, to access them all (filter by project for more clarity).

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div:
To automatically set a remark to "Done" or "Cancelled" state when they reach a given stage, create an automation from the Kanban view:
Open the remarks Kanban view of a given project.
Near the stage name (when unfolded), click the gear icon and then Automation.
Create a new automation and add an action.
Select the Update Record action and set the state to the desired value.
This works for task stages as well!

template.p: Inventory App manages materials, tracks deliveries, and monitors site stock to prevent delays or shortages.

ul.li: Stock Monitoring: Check available materials and reserve them for projects.
Reordering: Automate purchase orders for low-stock items.
Site Transfers: Allocate materials to specific construction sites.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Inventory﻿﻿
Purchase App helps you managing requests for proposal, your suppliers and contractors.

ul.li: Purchase Orders: Create purchase order for needed products and services.
Product Prices: Capture prices by suppliers to make the best moves.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: When ordering materials and services, fill in the analytic distribution to wire the expenses to specific projects.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Purchase﻿﻿

In some cases, suppliers may have products with heavily volatile prices.
So that you can at best compute project costs during quoting, you need most up to date product costs.
We setup an automation so that your product costs and purchase opportunities reflect your last purchases as follow:

ul.li: Triggers:
On vendor bill confirmation.
On purchase order confirmation.
Cost updates:
The product cost gets updated.
The vendor price list accounts for this new price in product Purchase tab to capture better deals (on cost and quantity).

template.p: The Planning app schedules tasks, allocates employees, and coordinates equipment use across multiple construction sites.

ul.li: Resource Allocation: Assign workers, subcontractors, and machinery.
Calendar Views: Visualize overlapping tasks and adjust workloads.
Roles: Assign roles to workers and leverage the auto-assign capability.
Alerts & Notifications: Ensure deadlines are met.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Planning﻿﻿
Timesheets App help track labour hours and project progress, enabling managers to measure performance and costs in real-time.

ul.li: Daily Logs: Employees enter hours per task.
Progress Reporting: Compare actual time vs planned.
Cost Analysis: Link labour to project expenses.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Timesheets﻿﻿
template.h3: 📈 Invoice the right amount at the right time
template.p: Invoicing App ensures timely billing, automates recurring invoices, and integrates with project milestones.

ul.li: Invoice from Quotation: Convert approved quotes into invoices.
Billing: Invoice based on work completion or project milestones.
Payment Tracking: Monitor outstanding client payments.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Schedule one or several "Invoicing Schedule" activities on the sales order with the aim to never forget to send an intermediary invoice in order to sustain your cash flow.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Before generating an intermediary invoice, capture a project update from its dashboard.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Invoicing﻿﻿

Typically, work items products are priced in a scale-able fashion and billed based on delivered quantity.
Those are defined as service products with invoicing based on manual delivery.

ul.li: From the project, expose all related aspects you want to have at fingertips with the slider icon (🎚️).
Open the Progress view. It captures all sale order lines associated to this project.
For each line, adjust the increment fields to capture delivered work since last invoice.

Once at the periodic billing moment, select those lines and trigger the delivery update.
This will update sale order to capture those increments and create a draft invoice.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div: Pro tip: Set progress increment directly on a section to go faster!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.div: This manual progress view is as well available from the sale order, in the Progress tab!

template.p:
Some other work items will be invoiced given the amount of time spent. The time sheet do not only help you to keep track of your costs, they as well are the lever to charge your customers
Those are defined as service products with invoicing based on time sheets.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: As soon as time sheets associated to sale order lines are approved, the recorded time is used as delivery metric!

template.h5: 🧾 Multiple orders turning into one bill
template.p: You may have signed multiple orders for a given contract and may not want to bill those one by one to your customer. Odoo comes with a capability for consolidated billing in such cases!

ul.li: Open the sale orders of your project from the project top bar.
Select all sale orders you aim at billing.
Click the Create Invoices button at the top of the list.
I the popup keep the consolidated billing checked and create your draft invoice!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: This use case is especially valuable when setting up change orders and extras!

template.p: Helpdesk App provides responsive customer service, tracks inquiries, and resolves issues efficiently.

ul.li: Ticket Management: Record issues or change requests.
Prioritization: Assign critical tickets to senior staff.
Client Portal: Allow customers to track the status of their requests.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: All the emails sent to help@your-company-domain will create a ticket that can be assigned to ensure the follow-up.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Helpdesk﻿﻿

The Planning App with its field service capabilities helps you manage on-site interventions such as follow-up works, warranty services, or urgent client requests. Technicians can access tasks, log hours, and report outcomes directly from their mobile devices.

ul.li: Open the Planning App.
Create shift, assign the Field service role, detail the intervention in the description and select the appropriate date.
Select a customer, a project if applicable.
Trigger the Auto-Plan to automatically assign workers.
Record time, materials used, and capture photos during intervention.
Generate detailed intervention reports, capturing time spent on the shift and invoice billable work when applicable.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3

p.strong: Alternativelly, from the Sales App, you can capture such work "on the fly":

li.div: Open the Sales App and open from the menu To Invoice, Services & Materials.
Create a new line, select the customer order this refer to, add the Field Service product and capture the time spent.

div.p: You can as well chose to make products expensable the same way from Services & Materials configuring their expense policy.

template.p: ﻿﻿🎓 Field Service ﻿﻿

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.
Discover more about Odoo by diving into our ﻿ ﻿documentation﻿﻿ and ﻿ ﻿academy﻿﻿ , and feel free to ﻿﻿request a demo﻿﻿ if you need help!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3

li.div: Standardize templates: Use quotation and project templates to save time and maintain consistency.
Keep documentation organized: Centralize contracts, drawings, and permits for easy access.
Monitor stock proactively: Avoid project delays by tracking inventory in real-time.
Track progress daily: Encourage teams to log time and update task status regularly.
Use dashboards: Set up reporting dashboards to monitor costs, schedules, and client satisfaction.

template.h2: Do You Want to Go Further?
template.p: Explore additional apps to enhance your construction business:

ul.li: Employees – Manage workforce, skills, and certifications.
Fleet – Track machinery, vehicles, and maintenance schedules.
Website – Publish projects, showcase services, and capture leads.
Accounting – Advanced financial management and reporting.
Sign – Collect digital signatures for contracts and approvals.

template.p: Odoo offers scalable solutions that grow with your business. By integrating these apps, construction companies can maximize efficiency, improve client relations, and reduce operational risks.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
﻿﻿Reach us﻿﻿

template.p:
You might have tested this package with or without demo data.
In any case, you may have written records in journals which are not deletable and which might be an issue for your traceability.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3

p.strong: In such situation, feel free to experiment with this database and then to create a new one for your own usage.
